raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"A general request to review a paper section centrally includes checking whether the method framing, contribution, and positioning are conceptually coherent.","R1.2":"The section makes a chain of claims from curvature feedback to optimization progress, so logical consistency is a central review responsibility.","R1.3":"The section invokes benchmark results and computational overhead to support cautious conclusions, making evidence-claim alignment central.","R1.6":"Because the delegation is a broad section review, sentence-level clarity, hedging, flow, and register are centrally expected.","RX.1":"The projection must preserve uncertainty around what kind of review is intended and around claims made in the artifact.","RX.2":"The projection should avoid inflating a short review request into responsibilities such as full novelty or scholarship audit.","RX.3":"The projection must stay within responsibility assignment and not perform the requested review itself.","RX.4":"The projection should avoid encouraging unsupported strengthening of optimization claims that could mislead downstream readers.","RX.5":"The rationale should trace each active responsibility to explicit features of the delegation or artifact."}}

rationale.R1.1: A general request to review a paper section centrally includes checking whether the method framing, contribution, and positioning are conceptually coherent.
rationale.R1.2: The section makes a chain of claims from curvature feedback to optimization progress, so logical consistency is a central review responsibility.
rationale.R1.3: The section invokes benchmark results and computational overhead to support cautious conclusions, making evidence-claim alignment central.
rationale.R1.6: Because the delegation is a broad section review, sentence-level clarity, hedging, flow, and register are centrally expected.
rationale.RX.1: The projection must preserve uncertainty around what kind of review is intended and around claims made in the artifact.
rationale.RX.2: The projection should avoid inflating a short review request into responsibilities such as full novelty or scholarship audit.
rationale.RX.3: The projection must stay within responsibility assignment and not perform the requested review itself.
rationale.RX.4: The projection should avoid encouraging unsupported strengthening of optimization claims that could mislead downstream readers.
rationale.RX.5: The rationale should trace each active responsibility to explicit features of the delegation or artifact.
